SEARCH
Package com.berryrock.integrationhub.client

Class SalesforceClientImpl

java.lang.Object
com.berryrock.integrationhub.client.SalesforceClientImpl
All Implemented Interfaces:
SalesforceClient
@Component public class SalesforceClientImpl extends Object implements SalesforceClient
Salesforce REST API client that authenticates via the OAuth 2.0 JWT bearer token flow. Part of the client layer — performs the JWT grant to obtain a short-lived access token, then issues a SOQL query against the Opportunity object to retrieve address fields needed for the Google Sheet and Buildium sync pipeline. The RSA private key used to sign the JWT is loaded from the file path injected via integration.vendor.salesforce.private-key-path. All configurable field names and the SOQL stage filter are injected from application.yml so the query can be adapted to different Salesforce org schemas without code changes. When integration.vendor.salesforce.enabled is false, all data-fetch methods return empty lists without making any HTTP calls.

    Constructors
    Constructor
    Description
    SalesforceClientImpl()

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    List<SalesforceAddressRecord>
    fetchAddressesForGoogleSheetBuildiumSync()
    Fetches all Salesforce Opportunity records that have a non-null street address, intended for use in the Google Sheet / Buildium address sync pipeline.
    boolean

    Returns whether the Salesforce integration is configured and enabled.

  • Constructor Details

    • SalesforceClientImpl

      public SalesforceClientImpl()
      Constructs the client with a default RestTemplate. All configurable properties are injected by Spring after construction via @Value field injection.

  • Method Details

    • isConfigured

      public boolean isConfigured()
      Description copied from interface: SalesforceClient
      Returns whether the Salesforce integration is configured and enabled.
      Specified by:
      isConfigured in interface SalesforceClient
      Returns:
      true if integration.vendor.salesforce.enabled is true

    • fetchAddressesForGoogleSheetBuildiumSync

      public List<SalesforceAddressRecord> fetchAddressesForGoogleSheetBuildiumSync()
      Description copied from interface: SalesforceClient
      Fetches all Salesforce Opportunity records that have a non-null street address, intended for use in the Google Sheet / Buildium address sync pipeline. Constructs a SOQL query dynamically from the field names configured in integration.vendor.salesforce.fields.*. If a integration.vendor.salesforce.query.stage-filter is set, a StageName = '<filter>' predicate is added to the WHERE clause. Handles Salesforce query result pagination automatically via the nextRecordsUrl field in each response page.
      Specified by:
      fetchAddressesForGoogleSheetBuildiumSync in interface SalesforceClient
      Returns:
      list of typed address records; empty list if the integration is disabled or an error occurs during authentication or query execution
